headline: 110-year-old Home Depot rival closes
summary: Before big-box retailers, most communities had a local hardware store. In many cases, these stores served as a community hub, selling everything from building supplies and hardware to grills and whatever a homeowner might need that wasn't readily available elsewhere. These stores still have a role, ...
